feedback.text: I really like the ambitions behind this initiative. This will be able to help improve the user/consumer experience online. You are already addressing some issues related to video games. I'd love to see you also tackle the issue of game publishers whom consumers have bought a game from (not a subscription) disabling the game after purchase, making the game unplayable. This industry issue is also taking place for ebooks, where a purchased book can be retracted by the publisher without a refund to the consumer. Please consider including a way of preventing publishers from doing this. Thank you.
